title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DB Schenker India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DB Schenker India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
